title: Give Us Terracotta Stairs! (G.U.T.S)
description: Simply adds Terracotta block variants (Stairs, Slabs, Walls), and that's it, no extra fluff.
body:
## Description
Other mods that add terracotta block variants either have too much fluff, or arent up to date.
This mod was made to do one thing, and one thing only. It adds Terracotta Stairs, Slabs, and Walls. And that's it.
![GUTS Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6a5744409c988057ac66b513c3c8faa94d65199_0.webp)
## FAQ
**Q: How does texture pack support work?**
> A: GUTS pulls directly from the terracotta textures, so any texture pack that changes terracotta will also change the additional blocks.

**Q: Version Support? Ports to 1.X.X?**
> A: My goal is to support every version that I can from 1.21 onward. Though it may take a while if Mojang decides to change a lot on the backend (like in 1.21.3).
>
> As for backports, we will see.

**Q: Other modloaders? Neoforge?**
> A: While Neoforge is not officially supported, [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) should work since GUTS is a fairly simple mod.

**Q: HELP! I've Encountered a bug! / Something doesn't work!**
> A: If you encounter any issues at all, please don't be afraid to join [the discord](https://discord.com/invite/VdtQBPY) and submit a bug report.
